name: Wood Parquet Calculator
seo_description: Wood Parquet Calculator. Area to cover, m² per box, Laying pattern — get Area with waste, Boxes, Varnish (litres) instantly for your flooring and tiling.
example_label: Calculate parquet of madera to 40m² with colocación pegada (cajas of 1.8m²).
result_context: To {area} m² with colocación {colocacion} se need {cajas_ud} cajas of parquet ({m2_total} m²), {adhesivo_kg} kg of adhesivo and {zocalos_ml} ml of zócalos.
formula_display: Cajas = area ÷ m2_por_caja; Adhesivo = area × 1.2 kg/m² (pegado)
steps: Apply waste 8% (parquet requires more cortes): 23 × 1.08 = 24.84 → 25 cajas
Calculate zócalos: perimeter of The room
mistakes: No nivelar perfectamente The contrapiso antes of pegar
No respetar time of curado of the adhesivo antes of transitar
No Consider The dirección of colocación (luz natural vs. veta)
description: Wood Parquet Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Wood Parquet Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
